subject: 英语
description: 广东中考英语 · 语法专项训练 + 单词突破

modules.title: 代词（主格/宾格/形物/名物）
modules.knowledge: 动词前用主（I），动词/介词后用宾（me）；有名则形（my book），无名则名（It is mine）。

parts.instructions: 从A、B、C三个选项中选出可以填入空白处的最佳选项。

questions.stem: My English teacher is very kind. We all like ___ very much.
questions.analysis:
横线在动词 like 后面，动词/介词后用宾格。she的宾格是her，故选B。
🔑 技巧：看到横线在动词后面，立刻找宾格（me/her/him/them）。

questions.stem: ___ is a hero. He saved a little girl from the fire yesterday.
questions.analysis:
横线在句子开头，后面紧跟动词 is，说明缺少主语，用主格He，故选A。
🔑 技巧：句子开头+动词前 = 主格（I/He/She/We/They）。

questions.stem: This is not my schoolbag. ___ is blue.
questions.analysis: 横线在句子开头作主语，且后面没有名词，表示

，用名词性物主代词Mine，故选C。
🔑 技巧：有名则形（my book），无名则名（It is mine）。

questions.stem: My sister loves music. ___ often plays the piano in the evening.
questions.analysis:
横线在句子开头，后面是动词 plays，缺少主语，用主格She，故选A。
🔑 技巧：前一句提到My sister（女性），代词要前后一致。

parts.instructions: 用括号内单词的正确形式填空。

questions.stem: My name is Li Hua. ___ (I) have a good friend.
questions.analysis:
横线在动词have前面，作主语，用主格I。
🔑 技巧：动词前找主格（I/you/he/she/we/they）。

questions.stem: ___ (he) name is Zhang Wei. He is my classmate.
questions.analysis:
横线后面有名词name，需要用形容词性物主代词。he的形物代是His。
🔑 技巧：横线+名词=形物代（my/your/his/her/our/their），有名则形。

questions.stem: Zhang Wei took many photos and showed ___ (they) to me.
questions.analysis:
横线在动词showed后面，作宾语，用宾格。they的宾格是them。
🔑 技巧：动词后用宾格（me/him/her/us/them）。

questions.stem: The red hat on the grass is ___ (he). He bought it yesterday.
questions.analysis: 横线在句末，后面没有名词，表示

，用名词性物主代词his。注意：his的形物代和名物代同形。
🔑 技巧：无名则名，his既是形物代也是名物代，但后面没名词时就是名物代。

modules.title: 名词复数（不规则变化）
modules.knowledge: 变元音：man→men, woman→women, foot→feet, tooth→teeth；单复数同形：sheep, deer, Chinese；特殊：child→children, mouse→mice。

parts.instructions: 从A、B、C三个选项中选出可以填入空白处的最佳选项。

questions.stem: There are many ___ on the farm. They are so lovely.
questions.analysis:
many后面用复数，但sheep是单复数同形，不能加s，故选B。
🔑 技巧：sheep、deer、Chinese这三个词单复数长一样，广东中考高频陷阱题。

questions.stem: Look at the two ___ over there. They are talking happily.
questions.analysis:
two后面用复数，woman的复数是不规则变化women（a变e），故选B。
🔑 技巧：man→men，woman→women，都是把a变成e。

questions.stem: The two ___ are playing games in the park now.
questions.analysis:
two后面用复数，child的复数是不规则变化children，不能直接加s或ren，故选C。
🔑 技巧：child→children是广东中考必背不规则变化。

questions.stem: Brush your ___ every morning and evening.
questions.analysis:
牙刷的不止一颗牙，用复数。tooth的复数是不规则变化teeth（oo变ee），故选C。
🔑 技巧：tooth→teeth，foot→feet，都是oo变ee。

parts.instructions: 用括号内单词的正确形式填空。

questions.stem: There are many ___ (child) playing games in the park now.
questions.analysis:
many后面加名词复数，child变复数是不规则的children。
🔑 技巧：看到many/some/数字，立刻想名词变复数，child→children必背。

questions.stem: In the old days, some ___ (man) worked in the fields all day.
questions.analysis:
some后面加复数，man变复数把a变e，变成men。
🔑 技巧：man→men，woman→women，记住a变e。

questions.stem: Look! Those ___ (sheep) are eating grass on the hill.
questions.analysis:
Those后面用复数，但sheep是单复数同形，不用加s。
🔑 技巧：sheep不管前面有没有many/some/those，永远长这样。

questions.stem: There are two ___ (mouse) in the corner. The cat is chasing them.
questions.analysis:
two后面用复数，mouse的复数是不规则变化mice。
🔑 技巧：mouse→mice是中考高频不规则变化，和child→children并列必背。

modules.title: 一般现在时 & 一般过去时
modules.knowledge: 现在时标志词：always, usually, often, sometimes, every day。过去时标志词：yesterday, ...ago, last..., in 2022。三单加-s/-es，过去式规则加-ed，不规则需背诵。

parts.instructions: 从A、B、C三个选项中选出可以填入空白处的最佳选项。

questions.stem: My father ___ a newspaper every morning after breakfast.
questions.analysis:
every morning是一般现在时标志。主语My father是单数（三单），动词要加s，read变成reads，故选B。
🔑 技巧：看到every day/morning，用现在时；主语是三单，动词加s。

questions.stem: I ___ to the library with my friends last Sunday afternoon.
questions.analysis:
last Sunday是过去时标志。go的过去式是不规则变化went，故选C。
🔑 技巧：go→went是中考最高频的不规则动词之一，必背。

questions.stem:
— What did you do last night?
— I ___ for the English test.
questions.analysis:
问句用did开头，且有last night，确定是过去时。study的过去式是studied（y变i加ed），故选B。
🔑 技巧：看到last night/week/year，直接找动词过去式。

questions.stem: He ___ football with his classmates every weekend.
questions.analysis:
every weekend是现在时标志。主语He是三单，play加s变成plays，故选A。
🔑 技巧：三单主语+every...=动词加s/es。

questions.stem: Zhang Guimei ___ a free high school for girls many years ago.
questions.analysis:
many years ago是过去时标志。start是规则动词，直接加ed变成started，故选B。
🔑 技巧：看到...ago，一律用过去式。

parts.instructions: 用括号内单词的正确形式填空。

questions.stem: Listen! Our teacher often ___ (tell) us funny stories in class.
questions.analysis:
often表示一般现在时。主语Our teacher是单数，动词加s，tell变成tells。
🔑 技巧：often=现在时，三单主语加s。注意：虽然开头有Listen!，但often才是决定时态的关键。

questions.stem: We ___ (buy) some fresh fruit in the supermarket yesterday.
questions.analysis:
yesterday是过去时标志。buy的过去式是不规则变化bought。
🔑 技巧：buy→bought是中考高频不规则动词，和bring→brought一起记。

questions.stem: She ___ (go) to Beijing two days ago.
questions.analysis:
two days ago是过去时标志。go的过去式是不规则变化went。
🔑 技巧：ago = 过去时，go→went必背。

questions.stem: My brother always ___ (do) his homework before dinner.
questions.analysis:
always是一般现在时标志。主语My brother是三单，do变does。
🔑 技巧：always=现在时，三单do→does，have→has。

modules.title: 现在进行时 & 一般将来时
modules.knowledge: 进行时：am/is/are + doing（标志词：now, Look!, Listen!）。将来时：will + 动词原形 或 be going to + 动词原形（标志词：tomorrow, next..., soon, in the future）。

parts.instructions: 从A、B、C三个选项中选出可以填入空白处的最佳选项。

questions.stem:
— Where is your sister?
— She ___ the piano in her bedroom now.
questions.analysis:
now是现在进行时标志，结构为be + doing。主语She是单数，用is + playing，故选B。
🔑 技巧：看到now，立刻想be + doing。

questions.stem: Listen! Some birds ___ in the trees outside.
questions.analysis:
Listen!是现在进行时标志。Birds是复数，用are + singing，故选B。
🔑 技巧：Look! / Listen! = 进行时，be动词根据主语变。

questions.stem: We ___ a class meeting about safety next Monday.
questions.analysis:
next Monday是一般将来时标志，用will + 动词原形，故选C。
🔑 技巧：看到next.../tomorrow，直接will + 原形，最稳妥。

questions.stem: Look! The children ___ games happily on the playground.
questions.analysis:
Look!是现在进行时标志。children是复数，用are + playing，故选C。
🔑 技巧：Look! + 复数主语 = are doing。

parts.instructions: 用括号内单词的正确形式填空。

questions.stem: Keep quiet! My baby brother ___ (sleep) in the room.
questions.analysis:
暗示婴儿正在睡觉，用现在进行时。baby brother是单数，用is + sleeping。
🔑 技巧：语境暗示进行时，be动词不能漏。

questions.stem: I think there ___ (be) more robots in our homes in the future.
questions.analysis:
in the future是将来时标志，用will + 动词原形be。
🔑 技巧：will后面永远跟原形，不管主语是谁。

questions.stem: My family ___ (visit) the Great Wall next summer holiday.
questions.analysis:
next summer holiday是将来时标志，用will + visit。
🔑 技巧：也可填are going to visit，但will visit最简单稳妥。

modules.title: 形容词/副词（比较级/最高级/变副词）
modules.knowledge: 比较级标志词：than（加-er或more）；最高级标志词：the, in/of（加-est或most）；形容词变副词：加-ly；不规则变化：good→better→best, bad→worse→worst, many→more→most。

parts.instructions: 从A、B、C三个选项中选出可以填入空白处的最佳选项。

questions.stem: This story is much ___ than that one.
questions.analysis:
看到than，立刻想到比较级。interesting是多音节长单词，前面加more，故选B。
🔑 技巧：than=比较级；短词加-er，长词加more。

questions.stem: Who is ___ student in your class?
questions.analysis:
in your class表示在一个范围内比较，用最高级。最高级前必须加the，故选A。
🔑 技巧：看到in/of表示范围，直接用最高级，前面加the。

questions.stem: He ran ___ than his brother and won the race.
questions.analysis:
看到than，用比较级。fast是短单词，直接加er变成faster，故选B。
🔑 技巧：than + 短词 = 加-er。此处修饰ran（跑）用副词的比较级。

questions.stem: The weather today is even ___ than it was yesterday.
questions.analysis:
看到than，用比较级。bad的比较级是不规则变化worse，故选B。
🔑 技巧：good→better, bad→worse, many→more是中考三大不规则比较级，必背。

parts.instructions: 用括号内单词的正确形式填空。

questions.stem: Please read the instructions ___ (careful) before you use the machine.
questions.analysis:
修饰动词read，要用副词。careful变副词直接加ly。
🔑 技巧：动词后面用副词，形容词+ly变副词。

questions.stem: Of all the subjects, I think English is the ___ (useful) one.
questions.analysis:
Of all表示在所有里面比，用最高级。useful是多音节长单词，前面加most。
🔑 技巧：Of all = 最高级，长词加most。

questions.stem: He takes photos very ___ (good). Everyone likes his photos.
questions.analysis:
修饰动词takes，要用副词。good的副词是不规则变化well。
🔑 技巧：good→well是必考特殊变化，形容词变副词不是都加ly。

modules.title: 介词（时间介词 at/on/in）
modules.knowledge: at用于具体时刻（at 7:00, at noon, at night）；on用于具体某一天（on Monday, on June 1st）；in用于年/月/季节（in 2024, in May, in the morning）。口诀：at用点，on用天，in用大段年和月。

parts.instructions: 从A、B、C三个选项中选出可以填入空白处的最佳选项。

questions.stem: My school usually has a sports meeting ___ October.
questions.analysis:
October是月份，属于大时间，用in，故选C。
🔑 技巧：at点、on天、in年月。月份前永远用in。

questions.stem: My mother is going to have a party ___ the evening of May 4th.
questions.analysis:
陷阱题！虽然有evening，但后面有具体日期May 4th，具体的某一天用on，故选C。
🔑 技巧：只要有具体日期（某月某号），一律用on。这是广东中考最经典的介词陷阱。

questions.stem: I usually get up ___ 6:30 in the morning.
questions.analysis:
6:30是具体时刻，用at，故选A。
🔑 技巧：at用于钟点时刻（at 7:00, at noon, at midnight）。

questions.stem: People usually eat zongzi ___ Dragon Boat Festival.
questions.analysis:
Dragon Boat Festival是节日，节日名称前通常用at，故选A。
🔑 技巧：节日用at（at Spring Festival）。

modules.title: 连词（and/but/or/so/because/although）
modules.knowledge: and：顺承并列；but：转折；or：选择；so：结果；because：原因；although：尽管（必考陷阱：although和but不能同时出现！because和so也不能同时出现！）

parts.instructions: 从A、B、C三个选项中选出可以填入空白处的最佳选项。

questions.stem: We were tired, ___ we were very happy after the long walk.
questions.analysis: 前面
，后面

，是转折关系，用but，故选B。
🔑 技巧：翻译前后句，意思相反用but，因果用so，顺承用and。

questions.stem:
— Do you like tea ___ coffee?
— Tea, please.
questions.analysis:
问句里提供两个选择（茶还是咖啡），用or，故选B。
🔑 技巧：疑问句中提供选项用or。

questions.stem: Although it was raining hard, the football match still went on. (判断句子是否正确)
questions.analysis:
这个句子是正确的。Although引导从句，主句直接跟上，不需要也不能加but。
🔑 技巧：Although和but在英语中只能二选一，不能同时出现。同理，because和so也不能连用。

questions.stem: I didn't go to school yesterday ___ I had a bad cold.
questions.analysis: 后面
是前面

的原因，用because，故选B。
🔑 技巧：because后面跟原因，so后面跟结果。不要because和so同时用。

modules.title: 祈使句 & 感叹句
modules.knowledge: 祈使句：肯定用动词原形开头（Be careful!），否定用Don't + 动词原形。感叹句：What + (a/an) + 形容词 + 名词!；How + 形容词/副词!。口诀：What名，How形。

parts.instructions: 从A、B、C三个选项中选出可以填入空白处的最佳选项。

questions.stem:
— ___ delicious the mooncakes are!
— Yes. I'd like to have another one.
questions.analysis:
断句法：划掉末尾的 the mooncakes are。剩下 delicious，是形容词，没有名词，用How，故选C。
🔑 技巧：What名，How形。把主语谓语遮住，剩下形容词用How。

questions.stem: ___ talk to each other when you are having an exam.
questions.analysis:
考查否定祈使句。开头用Don't + 动词原形，故选B。
🔑 技巧：禁止做某事，开头用Don't，后面动词用原形。

questions.stem: ___ fine weather it is today! Let's go for a picnic.
questions.analysis:
断句法：划掉 it is。剩下 fine weather。weather是不可数名词，不能加a，用What，故选A。
🔑 技巧：weather是不可数名词，永远不说a weather。

parts.instructions: 用括号内单词的正确形式填空。

questions.stem: ___ (be) quiet! Your father is sleeping.
questions.analysis:
考查祈使句。祈使句用动词原形开头。quiet是形容词，需要加系动词Be。
🔑 技巧：祈使句=动词原形开头，形容词前加Be。

questions.stem: ___ (not run) in the hallway. It's dangerous.
questions.analysis:
考查否定祈使句。Don't + 动词原形。
🔑 技巧：Don't后面永远跟原形。

questions.stem: ___ helpful the boy is! (用What或How填空)
questions.analysis:
断句法：划掉the boy is。剩下 helpful，是形容词，没有名词，用How。
🔑 技巧：What名How形，遮住主语谓语看剩下什么。

modules.title: 被动语态
modules.knowledge: 被动语态 = be + 过去分词(done)。一般现在时：am/is/are + done；一般过去时：was/were + done；情态动词：can/must/should + be + done。

parts.instructions: 从A、B、C三个选项中选出可以填入空白处的最佳选项。

questions.stem: Rice ___ in the south of China.
questions.analysis: 主语Rice是物，水稻是

的，用被动语态。Rice不可数，用is grown，故选B。
🔑 技巧：主语是物+动作是
的=被动语态。

questions.stem: The Olympic Games ___ every four years.
questions.analysis: 奥运会是

的。every four years是频率，用一般现在时。Games是复数，用are held，故选B。
🔑 技巧：every...=现在时，复数主语用are+done。

questions.stem: These computers ___ to a village school last month.
questions.analysis: 电脑是

的。last month是过去时。computers是复数，用were given，故选C。
🔑 技巧：last...=过去时，复数用were+done。

questions.stem: The homework must ___ on time.
questions.analysis: 作业是

的。must是情态动词，后面接be + done。finish的过去分词是finished，故选B。
🔑 技巧：情态动词+be+done，done用过去分词。

parts.instructions: 用括号内单词的正确形式填空。

questions.stem: Paper ___ (invent) by the Chinese long ago.
questions.analysis: 纸是

的。long ago是过去时标志，Paper看作单数，用was invented。
🔑 技巧：ago=过去时，单数主语用was+done。

questions.stem: Mobile phones ___ (use) by billions of people today.
questions.analysis: 手机是

的。today是现在时，phones是复数，用are used。
🔑 技巧：today=现在时，复数用are+done。

questions.stem: Your room should ___ (clean) every day.
questions.analysis: 房间是

的。should是情态动词，后接be + done。
🔑 技巧：should/can/must + be + 过去分词。

modules.title: 非谓语动词（to do / doing）
modules.knowledge: to do：want/decide/hope/choose/plan to do；doing：enjoy/finish/practice/keep/mind doing；介词后动词一律加-ing；look forward to的to是介词（大坑！）。

parts.instructions: 从A、B、C三个选项中选出可以填入空白处的最佳选项。

questions.stem: My father plans ___ a new car next month.
questions.analysis:
plan后面跟to do，固定搭配plan to do sth.，故选B。
🔑 技巧：想要决定选to do（want/decide/hope/choose/plan to do）。

questions.stem: You should practice ___ English every morning.
questions.analysis:
practice后面跟doing，固定搭配practice doing sth.，故选C。
🔑 技巧：喜欢完成加doing（enjoy/finish/practice/keep/mind doing）。

questions.stem: It's necessary for us ___ a plan before we start.
questions.analysis:
经典句型：It's + adj. + for sb. + to do sth.，故选B。
🔑 技巧：看到It's + 形容词 + for sb.，后面必接to do。

questions.stem: What about ___ some juice? I'm a bit thirsty.
questions.analysis:
about是介词，介词后面动词一律加-ing，故选C。
🔑 技巧：介词（in/on/at/for/about/of/with）+ doing，这是铁律。

questions.stem: I'm looking forward to ___ you soon.
questions.analysis:
超级陷阱题！look forward to中的to是介词，不是不定式符号，后面必须加doing，故选B。
🔑 技巧：look forward to + doing是广东中考最高频的陷阱之一。

parts.instructions: 用括号内单词的正确形式填空。

questions.stem: He finished ___ (read) the book and went to bed.
questions.analysis:
finish后面跟doing，固定搭配finish doing sth.。
🔑 技巧：finish + doing，动词要变-ing形式。

questions.stem: The best way ___ (learn) English is to speak it often.
questions.analysis: way后面跟to do作定语，表示

。
🔑 技巧：way to do sth.是常见搭配，注意和介词+doing区分。

modules.title: 综合训练：完形填空
modules.knowledge: 综合考查词汇辨析、逻辑推理、上下文理解。

parts.instructions: 阅读下面短文，从A、B、C三个选项中选出可以填入空白处的最佳选项。
parts.passage: Last summer, I went to visit my grandparents in the countryside. They live in a small village ___1___ mountains. One morning, my grandfather asked me to help him ___2___ water from the well（水井）. At first, I thought it was ___3___, but I was wrong. The bucket（桶）was very heavy, and I could ___4___ carry it. My grandfather smiled and said, "Don't ___5___. You'll get used to it." After a few days, I became stronger and could help him easily. This experience taught me that hard work ___6___ us grow.

questions.analysis:
村庄在群山之中（多座山之间），用among。between用于两者之间。
🔑 技巧：between=两者之间，among=三者及以上之间。

help sb. do sth.，固定搭配，用动词原形carry。
🔑 技巧：help后可接to do或do，考试中直接跟原形最常见。

was后面用形容词作表语，easy是形容词。
🔑 技巧：系动词（be/get/become）后面用形容词，不用副词。
桶很重，我几乎不能搬动。hardly表示

。
🔑 技巧：hardly=几乎不（否定含义），hard=努力地/硬的。
爷爷鼓励我

。give up=放弃；give away=赠送；give out=分发。
🔑 技巧：give up是中考高频短语，意为

hard work是不可数名词作主语，视为单数，用三单helps。
🔑 技巧：不可数名词作主语=三单，动词加s。

parts.instructions: 阅读下面短文，从A、B、C三个选项中选出可以填入空白处的最佳选项。
parts.passage: Zhang Wei is a middle school student. He likes sports very much. Every morning, he ___1___ early and runs in the park. He thinks running is a good way to keep ___2___. Last month, he took part in a school sports meeting. He ran very fast and ___3___ the first prize in the 800-meter race. His classmates were proud of ___4___. Zhang Wei said, "If you want to be successful, you must ___5___ practicing." He believes that nothing is impossible ___6___ you work hard.

questions.analysis:
Every morning是一般现在时标志。主语he是三单，用gets up。
🔑 技巧：every...=现在时，三单加s。
keep + 形容词，表示

。keep healthy=保持健康。
🔑 技巧：keep后面加形容词，不是名词。

Last month是过去时标志。win的过去式是不规则变化won。
🔑 技巧：last...=过去时，win→won。

of是介词，介词后用宾格。he的宾格是him。
🔑 技巧：介词+宾格，这是铁律。

must是情态动词，后面接动词原形。
🔑 技巧：情态动词（can/must/should/will）+ 原形。

，用if表示条件。
🔑 技巧：if=如果，unless=除非，翻译上下文判断逻辑关系。

modules.title: 综合训练：阅读理解
modules.knowledge: 综合考查信息提取、推理判断、主旨理解能力。

parts.instructions: 阅读下面短文，根据内容选择最佳答案。
parts.passage: Zhang Guimei is a teacher in Yunnan. In 2008, she started a free high school for girls in the mountains. Many girls there could not go to school because their families were poor. Zhang believed that education could change their lives. She visited many families and persuaded them to let their daughters study. Thanks to her efforts, more than 2,000 girls have entered universities. Zhang once said, "As long as I have one breath, I will keep teaching." Her story has moved millions of people across China.

questions.stem: What did Zhang Guimei do in 2008?

options.label: B
options.text: She started a free high school.

questions.analysis: 原文第一句：

直接信息提取。
🔑 技巧：细节题找原文原句，注意时间状语定位。

questions.stem: Why couldn't many girls in the mountains go to school?
questions.analysis: 原文：

直接因果关系。
🔑 技巧：原因类题目找because引导的原因状语从句。

questions.stem: How many girls have entered universities thanks to Zhang?
questions.analysis: 原文：

数字细节题。
🔑 技巧：数字题直接回原文定位，注意more than和less than的区别。

questions.stem: What can we learn from Zhang's story?
questions.analysis: 推理题。原文Zhang believed that

，这是文章主旨。
🔑 技巧：主旨推理题找文中反复出现的核心观点。

modules.title: 综合训练：回答问题
modules.knowledge: 考查阅读理解 + 书面输出能力。回答时注意用完整句子，找准踩分点。

parts.instructions: 阅读短文，根据内容回答问题。将答案写在输入框中，完成后对照参考答案和踩分点。
parts.passage: My name is Li Hua. Last weekend, my classmates and I went to clean up a park near our school. We arrived at 8 a.m. and started to work. Some picked up rubbish, some watered the plants, and others swept the paths. We worked for about three hours. Although we were tired, we felt very happy because the park became much cleaner. Our teacher said we did a good job. I think it's meaningful to help our community.

questions.stem: When did they go to clean up the park?
questions.referenceAnswer: Last weekend. / They went to clean up the park last weekend.
questions.scoringPoints: 时间：Last weekend（1分），用完整句子回答更佳。

questions.stem: How long did they work?
questions.referenceAnswer: About three hours. / They worked for about three hours.
questions.scoringPoints: 时长：About three hours（1分），注意回答要包含about。

questions.stem: Why did they feel happy?
questions.referenceAnswer: Because the park became much cleaner.
questions.scoringPoints: 原因：park became much cleaner（1分），用because回答最规范。

modules.title: 写作模板
modules.knowledge: 广东中考英语写作万能模板，覆盖议论文、建议类、记叙文、书信/邮件四种常见体裁。

templates.title: 模板一：议论文（观点对比 / 利弊分析）
templates.suitable: 谈谈你对……的看法 / 是否应该…… / ……的利弊
templates.structure:
【开头段】引出话题
Nowadays, more and more people are paying attention to ______. Different people have different opinions about it.

【主体段1】一方观点
Some people think that ______. First, ______. Second, ______. What's more, ______.

【主体段2】另一方观点
However, other people hold a different view. They believe that ______. On the one hand, ______. On the other hand, ______.

【结尾段】我的观点
In my opinion / As for me, I agree with the first / second view. The reason is that ______. All in all, ______.
templates.example: 范文：Nowadays, more and more people are paying attention to mobile phones. Different people have different opinions about them. Some people think that mobile phones are very useful. First, they make communication easier. Second, we can get information quickly. What's more, mobile phones provide us with lots of entertainment. However, other people hold a different view. They believe that mobile phones have some disadvantages. On the one hand, some students spend too much time on them. On the other hand, it's bad for our eyes. In my opinion, we should use mobile phones wisely. All in all, every coin has two sides.

templates.title: 模板二：建议类（给建议 / 解决问题）
templates.suitable: 给某人提建议 / 如何解决某个问题 / 如何学好……
templates.structure:
【开头段】说明写信目的
I'm glad to hear from you. / I'm sorry to hear that you have trouble with ______. Here are some suggestions for you.

【主体段】具体建议
First of all, you'd better ______. It is a good way to ______.
Secondly, why not ______? By doing this, you can ______.
Thirdly, it's important to ______. Remember that ______.

【结尾段】鼓励与祝愿
I hope these suggestions will be helpful to you. I'm sure you will make progress if you keep trying. Best wishes!
templates.example: 范文：I'm sorry to hear that you have trouble with English learning. Here are some suggestions for you. First of all, you'd better read English every morning. It is a good way to improve your pronunciation. Secondly, why not listen to English songs? By doing this, you can learn new words easily. Thirdly, it's important to keep a diary in English. Remember that practice makes perfect. I hope these suggestions will be helpful to you.

templates.title: 模板三：记叙文（一次经历 / 难忘的事）
templates.suitable: 一次难忘的经历 / 我的假期 / 我的周末 / 我最喜欢的人/物
templates.structure:
【开头段】引出事件
I have experienced many things in my life, but ______ is the most unforgettable one. It happened on ______. At that time, I was ______.

【主体段】事件经过
At first, ______. Then, ______. What surprised me most was that ______. I will never forget the moment when ______.

【结尾段】感悟与收获
From this experience, I learned that ______. It taught me the importance of ______. All in all, I will always remember this special experience.
templates.example: 范文：I have experienced many things in my life, but the school sports meeting is the most unforgettable one. It happened on a sunny Friday. At that time, I was in Grade 8. At first, I was very nervous because I had to run the 800-meter race. Then, I told myself to calm down. What surprised me most was that I won the first prize! From this experience, I learned that nothing is impossible if you try your best. All in all, I will always remember this special experience.

templates.title: 模板四：书信 / 邮件
templates.suitable: 写一封邮件给朋友 / 邀请信 / 感谢信
templates.structure:
【开头】
Dear ______,

How are you doing recently? I'm writing to ______ (invite you / thank you / tell you about ...).

【主体】
First of all, I want to tell you that ______.
Secondly, ______ is also important. You should pay attention to ______.
By the way, don't forget to ______.

【结尾】
I'm looking forward to your reply. If you have any questions, please let me know.

Yours,
Li Hua
templates.example: 范文：Dear Tom, How are you doing recently? I'm writing to invite you to my birthday party. First of all, I want to tell you that the party will be held at my home this Saturday evening. Secondly, the time is also important. You should arrive before 7 p.m. By the way, don't forget to bring your favorite CD. I'm looking forward to your reply. Yours, Li Hua.

templates.title: 模板五：万能过渡词 & 句型汇总
templates.structure:
功能句型/词汇
首先First / First of all / To begin with
其次Second / Secondly / Besides / What's more
总结All in all / In a word / In short
对比On the one hand... On the other hand... / However
因果because / so / As a result
举例For example / For instance / Such as
个人观点In my opinion / As for me / Personally speaking
建议You'd better... / Why not...? / It's a good idea to...

modules.title: 易混动词辨析
modules.knowledge: look(看的过程)/see(看的结果)/watch(长时间观看)/read(阅读)；say(说内容)/speak(说语言)/tell(告诉)/talk(交谈)；bring(带来)/take(带走)/carry(搬运)；borrow(借入)/lend(借出)/keep(借多久)。

parts.instructions: 从A、B、C、D四个选项中选出可以填入空白处的最佳选项。

questions.stem: Please ___ the blackboard carefully. Can you ___ the words clearly?
questions.analysis: look at强调
的动作，see强调

。看黑板是动作→look at，看清字是结果→see。故选A。
🔑 技巧：look at=看的过程，see=看的结果，watch=长时间观看，read=阅读文字。

questions.stem: My grandfather often ___ me interesting stories before I go to bed.
questions.analysis:
讲故事用tell stories，固定搭配。say强调内容，speak强调语言/演讲，talk强调交谈。
🔑 技巧：tell a story / tell a lie / tell the truth 都是tell的固定搭配。

questions.stem: Can you ___ me your dictionary? I want to ___ it for a few days.
questions.analysis: 是lend me；

不能用borrow（短暂动作），要用keep（延续性动词）。故选C。
🔑 技巧：borrow=借入（borrow...from），lend=借出（lend...to），keep=借多久。

questions.stem: Please ___ your homework to school tomorrow. Don't ___ it at home.
questions.analysis: 带来学校用bring（朝向说话人）；

固定搭配是leave sth. at home，不是forget。
🔑 技巧：bring=带来，take=带走。forget+东西=忘记某物，leave+东西+地点=把某物落在某地。

questions.stem: ___! Can you ___ someone singing in the next room?
questions.analysis: Listen!是祈使句，表示
的动作；hear表示

的结果。故选B。
🔑 技巧：listen=听的过程（listen to），hear=听的结果（听到）。和look/see的区别一样。

questions.stem: I ___ 100 yuan from my mother and ___ it to my friend.
questions.analysis: 从妈妈那
用borrowed；

给朋友用lent。故选A。
🔑 技巧：borrow from sb.（借入），lend to sb.（借出）。

questions.stem: The box is too heavy. I can't ___ it to the third floor.
questions.analysis: 搬运重物用carry，强调

。bring/take强调方向，不强调重量。
🔑 技巧：carry=搬运（有重量感），bring=带来，take=带走。

questions.stem:
— What did he ___ at the meeting?
— He ___ we should work harder.
questions.analysis: 强调

用say，后面接说话的内容（we should work harder）。
🔑 技巧：say + 内容，speak + 语言，tell + 人，talk + about。

modules.title: 易混形容词/副词辨析
modules.knowledge: hard(努力地/硬的)/hardly(几乎不)；late(晚)/lately(最近)；near(附近)/nearly(几乎)；good(形容词)/well(副词/身体好)；alone(独自)/lonely(孤独)；quite(相当)/quiet(安静)。

parts.instructions: 从A、B、C、D四个选项中选出可以填入空白处的最佳选项。

questions.stem: He studied ___ for the exam, so he passed it easily.
questions.analysis: 修饰study用副词，hard本身既是形容词也是副词，意为
。hardly意为

，意思相反。
🔑 技巧：hard=努力地，hardly=几乎不（否定含义）。中考最爱考这对。

questions.stem: I could ___ believe my eyes when I saw the beautiful view.
questions.analysis: 句意为

，用hardly（几乎不）。
🔑 技巧：hardly=almost not，本身含否定义。hardly ever=几乎从不。

questions.stem: He lives ___, but he never feels ___ because he has many friends.
questions.analysis:
alone=独自一人（客观上），lonely=孤独（情感上）。他独居但不孤独。
🔑 技巧：alone强调
的状态，lonely强调

questions.stem: The baby is ___. Please keep ___.
questions.analysis:
asleep=睡着的（状态），sleepy=困的。keep quiet=保持安静，quite=相当。
🔑 技巧：asleep是表语形容词（不能放名词前），sleepy是普通形容词。quite和quiet拼写相近但意思完全不同。

questions.stem: She is a ___ student. She does everything ___.
questions.analysis:
修饰名词student用good（形容词），修饰动词does用well（副词）。
🔑 技巧：good=形容词（修饰名词），well=副词（修饰动词）/形容词（身体好）。

questions.stem: He arrived ___ for the meeting. He has been very busy ___.
questions.analysis: arrive late=迟到（late副词

），lately=最近（=recently）。
🔑 技巧：late既可作形容词也可作副词（晚），lately=最近。

questions.stem: The park is very ___ my home. It's ___ five minutes' walk.
questions.analysis:
near my home=在我家附近（near介词），nearly=几乎（=almost）。
🔑 技巧：near=附近，nearly=几乎。拼写差一个字母，意思差很远。

questions.stem: The ___ fish is still ___. Don't touch it!
questions.analysis:
living fish=活着的鱼（前置定语用living），still alive=仍然活着（表语用alive）。
🔑 技巧：living可放名词前（living things），alive只能放系动词后（is alive）。lively=活泼的。

modules.title: 易混名词辨析
modules.knowledge: family(家庭/家人)/home(家/归属感)/house(房子)；job(具体工作)/work(泛指工作)；problem(麻烦的问题)/question(寻求答案的问题)；voice(嗓音)/noise(噪音)/sound(声音)。

parts.instructions: 从A、B、C、D四个选项中选出可以填入空白处的最佳选项。

questions.stem: I have a happy ___. There are four people in my ___.
questions.analysis:
a happy family=一个幸福的家庭（指家人），in my family=在我家（指家庭成员）。
🔑 技巧：family强调
，home强调
，house强调

questions.stem: He found a new ___ in a bank. He has a lot of ___ to do every day.
questions.analysis:
a new job=一份新工作（可数名词，具体职位），a lot of work=很多工作（不可数名词，泛指）。
🔑 技巧：job是可数名词（a job），work是不可数名词（不能加a）。

questions.stem: The math ___ is too difficult. I can't work out this ___.
questions.analysis:
math problem=数学难题（需要解决的麻烦），work out this problem=解决这个问题。
🔑 技巧：problem=麻烦/困难（solve a problem），question=疑问（answer a question）。

questions.stem: Please speak in a low ___. Don't make any ___ in the library.
questions.analysis:
in a low voice=低声说话（人的嗓音），make noise=制造噪音。
🔑 技巧：voice=人的嗓音，noise=噪音（不悦耳），sound=泛指一切声音。

questions.stem: There are many ___ in the park. Some old ___ are playing chess.
questions.analysis: people本身是复数，表示
；表示

时才是可数名词（a people）。
🔑 技巧：people=人们（本身就是复数，不用加s），person=个人（可数，a person/two persons）。

questions.stem: The ___ in this shop are very beautiful. I bought a new ___ yesterday.
questions.analysis:
clothes=衣服（复数，不能加s），a piece of clothing=一件衣服。
🔑 技巧：clothes永远复数，cloth=布料，clothing=衣着的统称（不可数）。

modules.title: 高频固定搭配 & 介词短语
modules.knowledge: be good at(擅长), be proud of(为……自豪), look forward to(期待), pay attention to(注意), take care of(照顾), be interested in(对……感兴趣), be strict with(对……严格), be different from(与……不同)。

parts.instructions: 从A、B、C、D四个选项中选出可以填入空白处的最佳选项。

questions.stem: My sister is very ___ playing the piano. She practices every day.
questions.analysis:
擅长做某事：be good at doing sth.。be good for=对……有益，be good to=对……友好，be good with=善于应付……。
🔑 技巧：at+doing是固定模式，enjoy doing / be good at doing / be interested in doing。

questions.stem: All of us are ___ our motherland. It's becoming stronger and stronger.
questions.analysis:
为祖国自豪：be proud of。be afraid of=害怕，be tired of=厌倦，be sure of=确信。
🔑 技巧：proud是形容词，of后面接令人自豪的对象。

questions.stem: We are all ___ visiting the Great Wall next summer.
questions.analysis:
期待做某事：look forward to + doing。注意to是介词！
🔑 技巧：look forward to + doing是中考超级高频考点，to是介词不是不定式。

questions.stem: Please ___ what the teacher says. It's very important.
questions.analysis:
注意老师说的话：pay attention to。to是介词，后接名词/doing。
🔑 技巧：pay attention to + doing/n.，to同样是介词。

questions.stem: My grandmother is ill. I need to ___ her at home.
questions.analysis:
照顾奶奶：take care of。take part in=参加，take pride in=以……为傲，take place=发生。
🔑 技巧：take care of = look after，两者同义。

questions.stem: Tom is very ___ science. He wants to be a scientist in the future.
questions.analysis:
对科学感兴趣：be interested in。be strict with=对……严格，be different from=与……不同。
🔑 技巧：interested in + doing/n.，interesting是
（修饰物）。

questions.stem: Our teacher is very ___ us. She never allows us to be late.
questions.analysis:
对人严格用be strict with，对事严格用be strict in/about。
🔑 技巧：strict with + 人，strict in + 事。这是广东中考易错点。

questions.stem: Chinese culture is quite ___ Western culture in many ways.
questions.analysis:
与……不同：be different from。similar to=相似，the same as=相同，far from=远离。
🔑 技巧：different from是固定搭配，from不能换成with或to。

modules.title: 中考高频短语动词
modules.knowledge: put on/off/up/away/out; turn on/off/up/down; get up/on/off/along/over; take off/away/care of/part in; give up/away/out; look after/for/up/through/forward to。

parts.instructions: 从A、B、C、D四个选项中选出可以填入空白处的最佳选项。

questions.stem: It's cold outside. You'd better ___ your coat.
questions.analysis:
穿上外套：put on。put off=推迟，put away=收起来，put up=张贴/搭建。
🔑 技巧：put on=穿上（动作），wear=穿着（状态）。

questions.stem: The sports meeting was ___ because of the heavy rain.
questions.analysis:
运动会被推迟：put off。put out=扑灭。
🔑 技巧：put off=postpone（推迟），off有
的含义。

questions.stem: Please ___ the lights before you leave the room.
questions.analysis:
关灯：turn off。turn on=打开，turn up=调大（音量），turn down=调小/拒绝。
🔑 技巧：on=开，off=关，up=大，down=小。

questions.stem: I can't hear the music clearly. Can you ___ the radio?
questions.analysis:
听不清所以要调大音量：turn up。
🔑 技巧：turn up=调大（音量/温度），也引申为

questions.stem: When you don't know a word, you can ___ it ___ in the dictionary.
questions.analysis:
查字典：look up。look for=寻找，look after=照顾，look through=浏览。
🔑 技巧：look up+单词（查字典），look up to+人（仰慕）。

questions.stem: Smoking is bad for your health. You should ___ it ___.
questions.analysis:
戒烟：give up smoking。give away=赠送/泄露，give out=分发/耗尽。
🔑 技巧：give up + doing，和stop doing类似。

questions.stem: The plane will ___ at 10 o'clock. We need to hurry.
questions.analysis:
飞机起飞：take off。take away=带走，take care of=照顾，take part in=参加。
🔑 技巧：take off=起飞/脱下，两个意思都很常用。

questions.stem: I don't ___ well with my new classmate. We often argue.
questions.analysis:
与……相处融洽：get along (well) with sb.。get up=起床，get off=下车，get over=克服。
🔑 技巧：get along with = get on with，两者同义。

modules.title: 词性转换（词形变化）
modules.knowledge: success→successful→successfully；care→careful→carefully；health→healthy→healthily；important→importance；decide→decision；invite→invitation。

parts.instructions: 用括号内单词的正确形式填空。

questions.stem: He finally achieved ___ (succeed) after years of hard work.
questions.analysis:
achieved后接名词作宾语，succeed的名词是success。
🔑 技巧：动词(succeed)→名词(success)→形容词(successful)→副词(successfully)。

questions.stem: You should read the instructions ___ (careful) before using it.
questions.analysis:
修饰动词read用副词，careful变副词carefully（直接加ly）。
🔑 技巧：形容词+ly=副词，happy→happily（y变i加ly）。

questions.stem: Eating more vegetables is good for your ___ (healthy).
questions.analysis:
your后面接名词，healthy是形容词，名词是health。
🔑 技巧：名词(health)→形容词(healthy)→副词(healthily)。

questions.stem: He made an important ___ (decide) at the meeting.
questions.analysis:
an important后面接名词，decide的名词是decision。
🔑 技巧：动词以-de结尾变名词常为-sion（decide→decision, invite→invitation注意这个不一样）。

questions.stem: Thank you for your ___ (invite). I'd love to come.
questions.analysis:
your后面接名词，invite的名词是invitation。
🔑 技巧：invite→invitation（去e加ation），和decide→decision变形不同。

questions.stem: She sings very ___ (beautiful). Everyone enjoys her songs.
questions.analysis:
修饰动词sings用副词，beautiful变副词beautifully（直接加ly）。
🔑 技巧：大部分形容词+ly变副词，但good→well是特例。

questions.stem: The ___ (important) of learning English is clear to everyone.
questions.analysis:
The...of结构中用名词，important的名词是importance。
🔑 技巧：形容词以-tant结尾常变名词为-tance（important→importance）。

questions.stem: He is a ___ (help) person. He always gives others a hand.
questions.analysis:
修饰person用形容词，help的形容词是helpful。
🔑 技巧：名词+ful=形容词（help→helpful, care→careful, use→useful）。

modules.title: 不规则动词（过去式/过去分词）
modules.knowledge: 中考必背25组不规则动词：go→went→gone, do→did→done, have→had→had, see→saw→seen, get→got→got/gotten, make→made→made, take→took→taken, come→came→come, know→knew→known, write→wrote→written等。

parts.instructions: 从A、B、C、D四个选项中选出可以填入空白处的最佳选项。

questions.stem: I ___ a new bike from the shop yesterday.
questions.analysis:
yesterday是过去时标志，buy的过去式是bought。
🔑 技巧：buy→bought，和bring→brought一起记，都是-ought结尾。

questions.stem: Have you ever ___ to Beijing? I ___ there last summer.
questions.analysis:
have been to=去过（已回），have gone to=去了（未回）。last summer过去时用went。
🔑 技巧：been to=去过已回，gone to=去了未回。go→went→gone必背。

questions.stem: She ___ a letter to her pen pal last night.
questions.analysis:
last night是过去时标志，write的过去式是wrote。
🔑 技巧：write→wrote→written，注意过去式和过去分词不同。

questions.stem: The cake was ___ by my mother. It's delicious!
questions.analysis:
被动语态was + done，make的过去分词是made。
🔑 技巧：make→made→made（过去式和过去分词同形）。

questions.stem: He ___ me a beautiful gift on my birthday.
questions.analysis:
过去时用gave。give→gave→given。
🔑 技巧：give的过去式gave，过去分词given（和写write→wrote→written类似）。

questions.stem: I have ___ English for three years.
questions.analysis:
have done现在完成时，learn的过去分词可以是learned或learnt。两者都正确。
🔑 技巧：learn→learned/learnt，burn→burned/burnt，都是两种变形都对的规则/不规则混合动词。

questions.stem: He ___ his keys at home and couldn't get into the house.
questions.analysis:
过去时用left。leave→left→left。
🔑 技巧：leave→left和feel→felt一起记，都是e→e变特殊型。

questions.stem: The teacher ___ us how to solve the math problem.
questions.analysis:
过去时用taught。teach→taught→taught。
🔑 技巧：teach→taught和catch→caught一起记，都是-aught结尾。

parts.instructions: 用括号内单词的适当形式填空。

questions.stem: He ___ (write) a letter to his friend last night.
questions.analysis:
last night过去时，write的过去式是wrote。
🔑 技巧：write→wrote→written。

questions.stem: The bridge was ___ (build) in 2010.
questions.analysis:
被动语态was + done，build的过去分词是built。
🔑 技巧：build→built→built（和send→sent→sent类似的变形）。

questions.stem: She has ___ (speak) English since she was five.
questions.analysis:
has done现在完成时，speak的过去分词是spoken。
🔑 技巧：speak→spoke→spoken（和break→broke→broken类似）。

questions.stem: He ___ (feel) very happy when he heard the good news.
questions.analysis:
过去时用felt。feel→felt→felt。
🔑 技巧：feel→felt和keep→kept都是eel/eep变elt/ept型。

questions.stem: I have ___ (eat) my lunch. I'm full now.
questions.analysis:
have done现在完成时，eat的过去分词是eaten。
🔑 技巧：eat→ate→eaten。注意过去式ate发音/eɪt/。

modules.title: 不规则名词复数
modules.knowledge: child→children, foot→feet, tooth→teeth, mouse→mice, sheep→sheep(单复同形), deer→deer, Chinese→Chinese, man→men, woman→women, knife→knives, leaf→leaves。

parts.instructions: 从A、B、C、D四个选项中选出可以填入空白处的最佳选项。

questions.stem: Look! There are two ___ playing in the garden.
questions.analysis:
two后面用复数，child的复数是children。
🔑 技巧：child→children是广东中考最常考的不规则名词之一。

questions.stem: I brush my ___ twice a day to keep them healthy.
questions.analysis:
牙刷的不止一颗，用复数。tooth的复数是teeth。
🔑 技巧：tooth→teeth，foot→feet，都是oo变ee。

questions.stem: There are many ___ on the grassland. They look so cute.
questions.analysis:
sheep是单复数同形，不管前面有没有many，都不加s。
🔑 技巧：sheep、deer、Chinese这三个词单复数长一样。

questions.stem: There are three ___ and two ___ in the room.
questions.analysis:
man的复数是men，woman的复数是women，都是a变e。
🔑 技巧：man→men，woman→women。注意发音也不同。

questions.stem: Autumn is here. The ___ are turning yellow.
questions.analysis:
leaf的复数是leaves（f变v加es）。
🔑 技巧：以f/fe结尾的名词变复数常把f变v加es（leaf→leaves, knife→knives）。

questions.stem: There are two ___ in the kitchen. Be careful!
questions.analysis:
knife的复数是knives（f变v加es）。
🔑 技巧：knife→knives，wife→wives，life→lives，都是f变v加es。

questions.stem: We are all ___. We love our country.
questions.analysis:
Chinese单复数同形，不能加s。
🔑 技巧：以-ese结尾的国籍词（Chinese, Japanese）单复数同形。

questions.stem: Look! There are three ___ in the corner. The cat is very excited.
questions.analysis:
mouse的复数是mice。
🔑 技巧：mouse→mice和louse→lice（虱子）一样，ou变i。

parts.instructions: 用括号内单词的适当形式填空。

questions.stem: There are many ___ (sheep) on the farm.
questions.analysis:
sheep是单复数同形，不用变。
🔑 技巧：sheep/deer/Chinese单复数同形，不管前面是many还是a都要用原形。

questions.stem: My ___ (foot) hurt after walking for so long.
questions.analysis:
两只脚，用复数。foot的复数是feet。
🔑 技巧：foot→feet（oo变ee），tooth→teeth同理。
